meaning: n.恐惧,恐怖,可怕的人(或物),畏惧v.惧怕,担心
examples: My greatest dread is that my parents will find out.
Hath it always this dread effect?
You can imagine why other car makers might look at Dangjin with something like Hobbit-ish dread.
The banks dread a world in which consumers pay cash instead of borrowing at 18%.
